race.comment: DOMINANT DARCY (3) loves this course and distance winning three from three and it's hard to knock mares in form. Gets the reliable Gollan/Lang combination and looks the runner in this field with the most upside. Include from the favourable draw. WITHOUT PARALLEL (10) didn't measure up in a Randwick Kosciuszko before the spell but will find this assignment a stack easier. Can return in winning form. SAVAGERY VIBE (8) has a win and a second from three attempts over this distance range and is usually about the money. Top-three credentials. CINDERSEA (15) is one from one over this track and trip and gets in well at the weights with the claim. In the mix. DREAM LANTERN (16) rounds out the selections.
